LAN Connectivity Check (Ping).command: if ping -c 3 -W 2 192.168.1.2 > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "LAN_REACHABLE:true"; else echo "LAN_REACHABLE:false"; false; fi
LAN Connectivity Check (Ping).description: Checks inter-network connectivity by pinging a target host on the LAN. The target IP is defined by the fact 'lan.target.ip'.

Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP).command: wget -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 2>/dev/null; ec=$?; if [ $ec -eq 0 -o $ec -eq 8 ]; then echo "HTTP_STATUS:200"; else echo "HTTP_STATUS:000"; false; fi
Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP).description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP GET request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses wget instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.
